tasks.title: Initialize Go module and pin foundation libraries
tasks.description: go mod init github.com/felixgeelhaar/praxis (Go 1.25+). Add bolt v1.3.0, fortify v1.2.1, mcp-go v1.9.0, statekit v1.3.2, axi-go v1.2.0 at the same versions Mnemos uses. Acceptance: go mod tidy clean; go build ./... works.

tasks.title: Add Makefile mirroring Mnemos targets
tasks.description: Targets fmt, lint, test, build, check, sqlc, install, release-check. Mirror Mnemos's structure with version/commit/build-date ldflags. Acceptance: make check runs go fmt, go vet, golangci-lint run, go test ./..., and go build.

tasks.title: Configure sqlc.yaml for SQLite and Postgres engines
tasks.description: Two engines per TDD section 7.2 - sqlite (database/sql) and postgresql (pgx/v5). Generated code into internal/store/sqlite/sqlcgen and internal/store/postgres/sqlcgen. Acceptance: make sqlc exits 0 even with empty queries files.

tasks.title: Add .gitignore, .editorconfig, .golangci.yml
tasks.description: Mirror Mnemos's settings, swapping mnemos paths for praxis. Acceptance: golangci-lint run exits 0 on a fresh repo.

tasks.title: Add MIT LICENSE
tasks.description: MIT license file matching Mnemos's. README already references it. Acceptance: file exists; copyright names Felix Geelhaar.

tasks.title: Define DDD domain types
tasks.description: internal/domain/ with Capability, Action, ActionStatus, Result, Simulation, PolicyDecision, CallerRef, ActionError, AuditEvent per TDD section 3. Pure data, no I/O. Table-driven tests for invariants. Acceptance: go test ./internal/domain/... passes.

tasks.title: Implement Action lifecycle FSM with statekit
tasks.description: internal/domain/action_fsm.go using statekit. Encode transitions per TDD section 3.2. Forbidden transitions return errors. Acceptance: table-driven tests cover every allowed and forbidden transition.

tasks.title: Define repository ports
tasks.description: internal/ports/ with CapabilityRepo, ActionRepo, IdempotencyRepo, AuditRepo, PolicyRepo (Phase-2 stub) per TDD section 7.1. Plus MnemosWriter outbound port. Pure interfaces. Acceptance: interfaces compile; godoc covers contract semantics.

tasks.title: Write shared store contract test suite
tasks.description: internal/store/storetest/ - one RunSuite(t, repos) function exercising every repository port's contract. Used by all three backend tests. Acceptance: suite compiles; clear plug-in point for backend implementations.

tasks.title: Implement in-memory storage backend (reference)
tasks.description: internal/store/memory/ implementing every repo port using mutex-guarded maps. Canonical reference. Acceptance: RunSuite passes against memory backend.

tasks.title: Implement SQLite storage backend
tasks.description: internal/store/sqlite/ with migrations/ (forward-only), sqlcgen/, port adapter. Schema per TDD section 7.4. modernc.org/sqlite. Acceptance: RunSuite passes; make sqlc clean.

tasks.title: Implement Postgres storage backend
tasks.description: internal/store/postgres/ with migrations/, sqlcgen/, port adapter using pgx/v5. Schema per TDD section 7.3. Acceptance: RunSuite passes against containerized Postgres in CI; make sqlc clean.

tasks.title: Implement env-driven config and storage selector
tasks.description: internal/config/ reading PRAXIS_DB_TYPE / PRAXIS_DB_CONN / PRAXIS_HTTP_PORT / PRAXIS_HTTP_HOST / PRAXIS_MNEMOS_URL / PRAXIS_MNEMOS_TOKEN / PRAXIS_HANDLER_TIMEOUT / PRAXIS_IDEMPOTENCY_TTL / PRAXIS_POLICY_MODE. internal/store/store.go with Open(ctx, cfg) (Repos, error). Acceptance: tests cover each backend selection plus error on unknown type.

tasks.title: Implement CapabilityRegistry
tasks.description: internal/capability/ with Register(handler), List(), Get(name). Concurrent-safe. Each handler declares its Capability metadata. Acceptance: tests cover duplicate, unknown, List ordering.

tasks.title: Implement schema validator
tasks.description: internal/schema/ supporting JSON Schema (primary) and Go-struct registration. Validate input on Execute, output on handler return. Acceptance: tests cover valid, malformed, missing-field, extra-field inputs.

tasks.title: Implement Phase-1 PolicyEngine (global allow)
tasks.description: internal/policy/ with Evaluate(ctx, capability, action) PolicyDecision. Global allow-list with explainable decisions. Rule, decision, reason, timestamp on every action. Structure ready for Phase-2 scoped rules. Acceptance: every Execute and DryRun records a PolicyDecision.

tasks.title: Implement IdempotencyKeeper
tasks.description: internal/idempotency/ wrapping IdempotencyRepo. Lookup(key), Remember(key, result, ttl). Acceptance: re-execution with same key returns original Result without invoking handler.

tasks.title: Implement HandlerRunner with timeouts and panic recovery
tasks.description: internal/handlerrunner/ runs a Handler with per-capability timeout, recovers panics into structured ActionError. Classify errors retryable vs non-retryable. Acceptance: tests cover timeout, panic, returned error, clean success.

tasks.title: Implement Executor.Execute flow
tasks.description: internal/executor/ implementing TDD section 5.2 - resolve, validate, policy, idempotency, run, audit, emit. Status transitions go through statekit FSM. Acceptance: every branch has a named test.

tasks.title: Implement Executor.DryRun flow
tasks.description: DryRun per TDD section 5.3 - resolve, validate, policy, handler.Simulate (or best-effort preview), audit row with Status=simulated. Zero vendor side effects. Acceptance: tests verify no outbound vendor calls; preview validated against OutputSchema where simulatable.

tasks.title: Implement AuditLog append and queries
tasks.description: internal/audit/ with Append(ev) and Search(query). Lifecycle kinds received, validated, policy, executed, succeeded, failed, simulated. Backed by AuditRepo. Acceptance: every Executor branch writes expected audit events; search filters work.

tasks.title: Replay-from-audit canary test
tasks.description: Drive executor through every lifecycle path, then reconstruct action's full history from audit_events alone. The evidence-completeness canary - must always be green. Acceptance: replay matches actual lifecycle for every path.

tasks.title: Implement Slack send_message handler
tasks.description: internal/handlers/slack/send_message.go using Slack Web API. Forward client_msg_id as idempotency key. Implement Simulate. Vendor-sandboxed integration test (skipped without SLACK_TEST_TOKEN). Acceptance: re-executing same Action.ID never posts twice in the sandbox.

tasks.title: Implement SMTP send_email handler
tasks.description: internal/handlers/email/send_email.go using net/smtp. Deterministic Message-ID from idempotency key. Implement Simulate. Vendor-sandboxed integration test against MailHog (skipped without SMTP_TEST_HOST). Acceptance: duplicate sends produce single message at destination.

tasks.title: Implement OutcomeEmitter (Mnemos writeback)
tasks.description: internal/outcome/ posting praxis.action_completed events to Mnemos POST /v1/events. fortify/retry with Mnemos-equivalent defaults (5xx + 429 retry, 4xx fail fast, exponential backoff with jitter). Outbox in configured backend; background worker drains. Never blocks Execute. Acceptance: integration test against test Mnemos; metrics expose emit failures.

tasks.title: Implement HTTP API via axi-go
tasks.description: cmd/praxis/axikernel.go wiring axi-go routes per docs/integrations.md section 2.1. Mirror Mnemos's axikernel pattern. Auth via PRAXIS_API_TOKEN. Acceptance: HTTP contract tests cover each endpoint's success and rejection paths.

tasks.title: Implement CLI commands
tasks.description: cmd/praxis/main.go with subcommands praxis caps list, caps show, run, log show, serve. Acceptance: e2e tests against in-memory backend exercise each subcommand.

tasks.title: Wire bolt logging, healthz, and Prometheus metrics
tasks.description: Inject *bolt.Logger into every service constructor. /healthz on HTTP server. Metrics praxis_actions_total{capability,status}, praxis_action_duration_seconds, praxis_policy_decisions_total, praxis_idempotency_hits_total, praxis_outcome_emit_failures_total. Acceptance: curl /healthz returns 200; curl /metrics returns named series.

tasks.title: Implement public Go client
tasks.description: client/ mirroring Mnemos client patterns - New(baseURL, opts...), WithToken, WithLogger (bolt), WithRetry (fortify). Methods ListCapabilities, Execute, DryRun, GetAction. APIError type. Concurrent-safe. Acceptance: client tests against httptest server cover happy path, retry-on-5xx, fail-fast-on-4xx.
